steps.title: Identify the structural pivot
steps.content: The passage shifts at Although—from describing what Byrne and colleagues did (used museum-specimen DNA to investigate a pathogen) to explaining why this approach remains underutilized (degraded DNA is difficult to remediate with current technology).

steps.title: Match the structure to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A is correct: the passage presents a study and its methodology, then explains why adoption remains limited.
The others wrongly mischaracterize the text—
  • B suggests solutions when the passage emphasizes the barrier is “not easily remediable”
  • C wrongly discusses findings and replication
  • D wrongly portrays the method as common and the obstacle as adaptation-related
.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
